item.title: Ƒootscapes
item.description: A digital garden is not a website.

item.title: Fiat Corde - Spoken script
item.description: The full script of Fiat Corde, a ten-minute talk for an internal pedagogical conference. Kept in Portuguese, the language of the room.

item.title: Fiat Humanitas
item.description: Francisco de Goya y Lucientes, El 2 de mayo de 1808 en Madrid, 1814. Oil on canvas, 268 × 347 cm. Museo Nacional del Prado, Madrid.

item.title: Framing as repetition
item.description: Framing as Repetition The moldura is not a limit. It is what creates the object.

item.title: Notes on Fiat Corde
item.description: A reflection on Fiat Corde, a talk on framing, art and teaching. Not the week in Madrid, but what grew from it: how an experience becomes a lesson, and a lesson becomes dissemination.

item.title: Design
item.description: Notes on designing what stays. Essays, frameworks, methodological reflections.

item.title: Transforma-te, Transforma
item.description: An interdisciplinary project on bullying prevention at Arco Maior (2024/25), designed and produced by students aged 15–19. A case study in authentic learning, student agency and multimodal communication.

item.title: Experience
item.description: Notes on learning in the world. LXD projects with real audiences and measurable impact.

item.title: Portfolio
item.description: A working portfolio of trainer practice — experience, the frameworks I work with, and a running selection of projects.

item.title: A Note on Process
item.description: The notes in this garden were written collaboratively.
